parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Zero-based page index (0..N)

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

parameters.name: filterState
parameters.description:
Translation state in the format: languageTag,state. You can use this parameter multiple times.

When used with multiple states for same language it is applied with logical OR. 
 
When used with multiple languages, it is applied with logical AND.

parameters.name: languages
parameters.description:
Languages to be contained in response.
                
To add multiple languages, repeat this param (eg. ?languages=en&languages=de)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: String to search in key name or translation text

parameters.name: filterKeyName
parameters.description: Selects key with provided names. Use this param multiple times to fetch more keys.

parameters.name: filterKeyId
parameters.description: Selects key with provided ID. Use this param multiple times to fetch more keys.

parameters.name: filterUntranslatedAny
parameters.description: Selects only keys for which the translation is missing in any returned language. It only filters for translations included in returned languages.

parameters.name: filterTranslatedAny
parameters.description: Selects only keys, where translation is provided in any language

parameters.name: filterUntranslatedInLang
parameters.description: Selects only keys where the translation is missing for the specified language. The specified language must be included in the returned languages. Otherwise, this filter doesn't apply.

parameters.name: filterTranslatedInLang
parameters.description: Selects only keys, where translation is provided in specified language

parameters.name: filterAutoTranslatedInLang
parameters.description: Selects only keys, where translation was auto translated for specified languages.

parameters.name: filterHasScreenshot
parameters.description: Selects only keys with screenshots

parameters.name: filterHasNoScreenshot
parameters.description: Selects only keys without screenshots

parameters.name: filterHasDescription
parameters.description: Selects only keys with a description

parameters.name: filterHasNoDescription
parameters.description: Selects only keys without a description

parameters.name: filterNamespace
parameters.description:
Selects only keys with provided namespaces. 

To filter default namespace, set to empty string.

parameters.name: filterNoNamespace
parameters.description:
Selects only keys without provided namespaces. 

To filter default namespace, set to empty string.

parameters.name: filterTag
parameters.description: Selects only keys with provided tag

parameters.name: filterNoTag
parameters.description: Selects only keys without provided tag

parameters.name: filterOutdatedLanguage
parameters.description: Selects only keys, where translation in provided langs is in outdated state

parameters.name: filterNotOutdatedLanguage
parameters.description: Selects only keys, where translation in provided langs is not in outdated state

parameters.name: filterRevisionId
parameters.description: Selects only key affected by activity with specidfied revision ID

parameters.name: filterFailedKeysOfJob
parameters.description: Select only keys which were not successfully translated by batch job with provided id

parameters.name: filterTaskNumber
parameters.description: Select only keys which are in specified task

parameters.name: filterTaskKeysNotDone
parameters.description: Filter task keys which are `not done`

parameters.name: filterTaskKeysDone
parameters.description: Filter task keys which are `done`

parameters.name: filterHasUnresolvedCommentsInLang
parameters.description: Filter keys with unresolved comments in lang

parameters.name: filterHasCommentsInLang
parameters.description: Filter keys with any comments in lang

parameters.name: filterLabel
parameters.description: Filter key translations with labels

parameters.name: filterHasQaIssuesInLang
parameters.description: Filter keys with open QA issues in lang

parameters.name: filterQaCheckType
parameters.description:
Filter keys with specific QA check type issues in the format: languageTag,checkType.
You can use this parameter multiple times.

A key matches if any of the selected check types is present in any of the selected languages.

parameters.name: filterQaChecksStaleInLang
parameters.description: Filter keys whose QA checks are stale (pending recomputation) in lang. When set, only keys with at least one stale translation in any of the provided languages are returned.

parameters.name: filterHasSuggestionsInLang
parameters.description: Filter keys with any suggestions in lang

parameters.name: filterHasNoSuggestionsInLang
parameters.description: Filter keys with no suggestions in lang

parameters.name: branch
parameters.description: Selects only keys from specified branch

parameters.name: filterDeletedByUserId
parameters.description: Filter trashed keys by who deleted them (user IDs)
